notices: Alfred Bwanali, a Standard 7 learner at Mufti Abbas Primary School in Mangochi, who has a physical disability, is in need of support to acquire a wheelchair. We are, therefore, mobilizing contributions to help purchase a suitable wheelchair that will enable him to move around with ease. Those willing to assist can send their contributions through the following channels: Mpamba: 0884321582 (Mussa Kabichi) Airtel Money: 0995321582 (Mussa Kabichi) Mpamba Code: 237645 (Jonas Maleka) Airtel Code: 10030172 (Jonas Maleka) The total amount needed to purchase the wheelchair is MWK 675,000.
